footer.description: Hi, I'm Pau. Studying Web Application Development at Lacetània (Manresa). I'm passionate about technology and programming. I enjoy finding and creating functional and creative digital solutions.

list.title: Solsona Experience Web
list.description: Since 2023, I have been managing the website for the Solsona Experience cooperative, boosting its digital presence and improving communication with its visitors.

presentation.subtitle: Hi, I'm Pau
paragrafs: I'm from Solsona and currently studying Web Application Development (DAW) in Manresa, and I'm passionate about the technology ecosystem.

My philosophy is clear: detect challenges and build solutions. I don't settle for making the code 'simply work'; I strive for the result to be robust, creative, and well-made. That's why I enjoy transforming abstract ideas into real solutions that add value.
In a sector that never stops, I'm naturally curious: I like to stay updated, trying new tools and exploring the latest development trends.
Looking for someone with energy and passion for code? Let's talk!
